scripts.db:generate: npm run db:setup && node scripts/run-with-env.mjs generate
scripts.db:migrate: npm run db:setup && node scripts/run-with-env.mjs migrate dev
scripts.db:deploy: npm run db:setup && node scripts/run-with-env.mjs migrate deploy
scripts.db:push: npm run db:setup && node scripts/run-with-env.mjs db push --skip-generate
scripts.db:studio: npm run db:setup && node scripts/run-with-env.mjs studio
scripts.db:reset: npm run db:setup && node scripts/run-with-env.mjs migrate reset --force
